sensors.name: TF02-Pro
sensors.description: Benewake TF02-Pro is a time-of-flight LiDAR, ranging performance up to 40m. TF02 Pro liDAR is widely used in drone altitude holding, intelligent transportation, etc..

sensors.name: TF02-Pro-W
sensors.description: TF02-Pro-W is a self-cleaning industrial LiDAR for bulk material level detection. 25m range, Modbus/RS-485 ready, LoRaWAN/4G options. Built for dust and smoke.

sensors.name: TF02-i
sensors.description: TF02-i is a 40m ToF LiDAR with IP65 protection and 100KLux ambient light resistance. RS-485/CAN ready. Ideal for drone altitude hold and smart parking.

sensors.name: TF03
sensors.description: TF03 is an IP67 industrial-grade single-point long-range LiDAR with 180m detection and 7kHz frame rate. Ideal for UAV, intelligent traffic, and security.

sensors.name: TF350
sensors.description: TF350 is a 350m ultra-long-range solid-state LiDAR with IP67 rating and 7kHz frame rate. Built for bright and adverse weather. For UAV and industrial use.

sensors.name: TFA170-L
sensors.description: TFA170-L is a 10g ultra-light drone proximity sensor with 170m range — among the lightest in its class. DO-160G capable. For gimbals and long-endurance UAVs.

sensors.name: TFA300
sensors.description: TFA300 series is an ultra-high-frequency UAV LiDAR with 10,000Hz frame rate and 290m range. Only 10.5g. DroneCAN ready. For EO/IR gimbals and high-speed drones.

sensors.name: TF-Luna
sensors.description: Benewake TF-Luna is an affordable single-point LiDAR range finder. It can achieve stable, accurate and highly sensitive range measurement for robotics, drones, and more.

sensors.name: TFS20-L
sensors.description: TFS20-L is an ultra-compact dToF LiDAR at only 1.35g. 20m range, ±6cm accuracy, 100KLux sunlight resistance. Ideal for consumer drones, robots, and IoT.

sensors.name: TFmini-Plus
sensors.description: TFmini Plus is an IP65 LiDAR ranging sensors with ±5cm accuracy and drone-level anti-vibration. 12m range, 1000Hz. Pix compatible. For outdoor and harsh environments.

sensors.name: TFmini-S
sensors.description: TFmini-S is an ultra-compact micro LiDAR at only 5g. 12m range, 1000Hz frame rate, ±6cm accuracy. UART/I²C/I/O interfaces. Ideal for space-limited integration.

sensors.name: TFmini-i
sensors.description: TFmini-i can/rs485 Industrial-grade ip65 ranging module, applications: pedestrian detection, vehicle detection, altitude gauge, robot

sensors.name: VLS-H5
sensors.description: benewake VLS-H5 Underwater 360° Single-Line Scanning By performing distance measurements of the pool walls through 360° scanning at 6 times per second, VLS-H5 acquires high-precision point cloud

sensors.name: Horn-RT
sensors.description: Horn-RT is the first long-range 3D LiDAR in China based on the rail transit industry, meeting the industry's high-performance, high-reliability, and rigorous testing standards.

sensors.name: Horn-X2-Pro
sensors.description: Horn-X2 Pro is widely applicable to various complex scenarios, providing high-quality point cloud information for customers. It is a 3D LiDAR that combines high performance and high security.

sensors.name: TF-NOVA
sensors.description: TF-NOVA is a compact, high-accuracy line-pattern LiDAR sensor for area detection. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use in robotics, smart parking, and more.

sensors.name: TFA1200-L
sensors.description: The TFA1200-L is a lightweight, compact kilometer-range single-point LiDAR that ensures eye safety. It is used in inspection drones, drone pods, and engineering surveys, providing distance maintenance

sensors.name: TFA1500-L
sensors.description: TFA1500-L is a 1500m long-range drone rangefinder with up to 800Hz frame rate — kilometer-level precision at only 11g. For inspection and surveying drones.

sensors.name: TF-UW500
sensors.description: Adopting a dToF (direct Time-of-Flight) solution, the TF-UW500 maintains the compact design and low-power efficiency of its predecessor, while achieving a tenfold increase in detection range in low...
